title: Add debug logging to extractJSON for parsing method traceability
body:
## Context

From PR #223 code review (fingerprint: `14b0c3d75d809d486b3a07bfbe58f40d`)

## Problem

`extractJSON` in `internal/adapter/theme/extractor.go` has multiple parsing attempts but doesn't communicate which method succeeded. If a response contains both markdown code blocks AND raw JSON, it returns the first match without indicating ambiguity.

## Suggested Improvements

1. Add debug logging to indicate which extraction method succeeded
2. Consider returning an error if multiple valid JSON structures are found
3. Document the precedence order in comments

## Priority

Low - debug/observability enhancement.

## Related

- PR #223: Theme extraction feature
- Issue #224: JSON extraction robustness
